notes: Skill shows clear value on Eval 3 (CORS/Presigned URLs): 100% vs 60% pass rate. Without the skill, the agent used wrong Wrangler command (cors put vs cors set) and missed R2-specific CORS limitations.
Evals 1 and 2 pass at 100% for both configurations, suggesting these assertions may not be discriminating enough for basic S3 knowledge that the model already has.
The with_skill configuration uses ~63% more tokens on average, which is expected since the agent reads reference files.
The skill's main value-add appears to be provider-specific nuances (correct CLI commands, platform limitations) rather than general S3 knowledge.
